title: Tick Control Rockville Centre | Long Island Tick Extermination $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Rockville Centre, NY. Protect your family from Lyme disease with expert tick treatments. Licensed exterminators. Call today for $125-$325 tick removal!
intro: Rockville Centre's tree-lined streets, beautiful parks, and proximity to green spaces make it a wonderful place to live, but these same features create ideal habitats for ticks. Our professional tick control services protect Rockville Centre families and pets from the health risks associated with deer ticks, dog ticks, and other tick species common to Long Island. We provide comprehensive tick treatments for residential properties throughout this vibrant Nassau County village.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience treating tick infestations specific to Long Island's unique ecosystem, with licensed technicians who understand Rockville Centre's particular challenges from Mill River Park to the tree-canopied residential neighborhoods. Our eco-conscious treatments are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks at all life stages, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: From the historic homes near the Village Green to properties surrounding Blydenburg Park and the leafy streets near Riverside Boulevard, Rockville Centre's abundant vegetation and outdoor recreational areas create prime tick habitats. Our technicians are familiar with treating the Tudor-style homes, Victorian residences, and modern properties throughout the village, as well as the yards bordering wooded areas and the commuter rail corridors where ticks commonly thrive.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Rockville Centre?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Rockville Centre typically runs from April through November, with peak activity during the warmer months of May through September. However, during mild winters, ticks can remain active year-round on Long Island. We recommend beginning preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining protection through fall for optimal results.

faqs.question: What does your Rockville Centre tick control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted treatment of high-risk areas such as lawn perimeters, wooded edges, stone walls, and brush areas, application of EPA-approved tick control products, and a perimeter barrier treatment. We focus on areas where ticks commonly hide and where your family and pets frequent, with follow-up treatments available seasonally.

faqs.question: Are your tick treatments safe for children and pets in Rockville Centre?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children inside during application and until the treatment has dried (typically 2-4 hours). Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions tailored to your property and family's needs.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: Most customers notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Our barrier treatments provide ongoing protection for 3-4 weeks, and we recommend monthly treatments during peak tick season for continuous protection. For severe infestations, we may recommend a follow-up treatment within 2-3 weeks to target newly hatched ticks.
